Export to PPT 

Eliminate the manual task of transferring data into slides. Our app lets you focus more on analysis and less on preparation.

posts.author: Krishkg (Krishna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Export to PPT

  • Eliminate the manual task of transferring data into slides. Our app lets you focus more on analysis and less on preparation.
  • Directly export your monday.com Boards to PowerPoint with just a few clicks.
